# enum / table

The **enum** (select) type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "enum", ... })` — a read-only
`EnumCell` that renders the value as a muted chip via the `badge` primitive,
resolving the raw value to its display label through `field.options`. Empty
values render nothing.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Enum (select) field type: data-view table cell (read-only chip cell).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "enum" → `EnumCell`
  - Uses: `primitives/badge.Badge`, `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
